auth.logoutConfirm: You will be logged out and return to the login screen.

dashboard.title: CashLens
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your finances smartly
dashboard.noTransactionsDesc: Start recording your transactions to see summary and spending analysis on the dashboard.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.noTransactionsDesc: Start recording your daily transactions to see your financial history here.

scanner.title: Scan Receipt
scanner.cameraPermissionDesc: CashLens needs camera access to scan your transaction receipts.
scanner.cameraError: Camera failed to load. Check permissions and try again.
scanner.cameraErrorSimulator: Camera not available on simulator. Use a real device or pick from gallery.
scanner.noAmountFound: Could not find total amount on receipt
scanner.ocrOfflineFallbackDesc: Using offline OCR as fallback. Accuracy may vary.
scanner.quotaExceededDesc: Free tier limit reached (5/month). Upgrade to Premium for unlimited AI scans.
scanner.processingWait: This may take a few seconds

budget.title: Budget
budget.subtitle: Manage spending limits per category
budget.noBudgetsDesc: Create budgets to limit spending per category and track your progress.
budget.deleteBudgetConfirm: Delete this budget? This action cannot be undone.
budget.addBudgetDesc: Set a spending limit for this category

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage app preferences
settings.cloudSyncDesc: Your data will automatically sync with the cloud whenever there are changes. Sync occurs 2 seconds after changes to save quota.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Support and FAQ
help.howToScanDesc: Go to the Scan tab and take a photo of your receipt.
help.howToBudgetDesc: Go to the Budget tab and click the + button to create a new budget.
help.contactSupportDesc: If you have issues, contact us at support@cashlens.app

settings.logoutDesc: You will be logged out and return to the login screen.
settings.clearLocalDataWarning: ⚠️ WARNING: This will delete all local data (transactions, budgets, categories). Use this to fix sync UUID issues. Data on Supabase will not be affected.
settings.clearDataConfirmDesc: This will delete all local data (transactions, budgets, categories, etc.). Data on Supabase will not be affected. You must log in again after this.

notifications.permissionDesc: To detect transactions automatically, CashLens requires access to your device's notifications.
notifications.testSent: Test notification sent for BCA Mobile...

notificationSettings.title: Transaction Notifications
notificationSettings.subtitle: Manage automatic transaction detection
notificationSettings.enableFeatureDesc: Detect transaction drafts from bank and e-wallet notifications.
notificationSettings.selectAppsDesc: Only notifications from selected apps will be processed.
notificationSettings.telegramBotDesc: Send transactions directly via Telegram chat.
notificationSettings.linkingError: Failed to get linking token. Ensure backend is active.

drafts.title: Draft Inbox
drafts.successDesc: Transaction has been successfully added to your records.

form.amountRequired: Amount must be filled and greater than 0

sync.syncDesc: Your data will automatically sync with the cloud whenever there are changes.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Record daily income and expenses quickly and easily.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Take a photo of your receipt and let CashLens read the data for you.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Create budgets per category and monitor your spending every month.
